title: Spectral Quasi-Linearization Analysis of Nonlinear Contaminant Transport in a Porous Channel with Generalized Haldane Kinetics
description: SpeakForWater Episode 1: Spectral Quasi-Linearization Analysis of Nonlinear Contaminant Transport in a Porous Channel with Generalized Haldane Kinetics. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
